rationale: The candidate d8f2f28ac8fa38473647f4477b7dbb1dd7e6b9c5 provides the most natural and professional Hindi translation. It avoids the awkward Hinglish phrasing found in the 'current' version (e.g., 'jaise saved locations' or 'work done मान लेते हैं') and uses appropriate technical terminology while maintaining readability. It also correctly preserves all MDX structures and heading counts.
